assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Terraform configuration shows maintenance_policy with recurring_window set to Saturday 2AM UTC with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Response uses Terraform configuration instead of providing the specific gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Terraform configuration includes dynamic maintenance_exclusion blocks for quarterly freezes with proper start/end times and exclusion_options scope set to ALL_UPGRADES

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Configuration includes annual_audit_2024 exclusion for November 1-30, 2024 with proper maintenance_exclusion block

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades regarding maintenance window enforcement

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response uses REGULAR channel instead of recommending STABLE or EXTENDED channels for maximum upgrade control in regulated environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shell script includes gcloud container clusters update commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended maintenance exclusion periods
